title: odontostemma reductum
intro: Odontostemma reductum, also known as the lesser tooth-crowned, is a flowering plant species in the family Phrymaceae. It is native to China and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The plant contains compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Odontostemma reductum is often prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and infusions.
